name: vector-edit-gym
description: VectorEditGym: a benchmark for SVG icon editing with exact-change ground truth.

scripts.generate:all: node scripts/generate-very-easy.mjs && node scripts/generate-easy.mjs && node scripts/generate-medium.mjs && node scripts/generate-hard.mjs && node scripts/generate-very-hard.mjs && node scripts/build-index.mjs
scripts.viewer:dev: npm run engine:sync && npm --prefix viewer run dev
scripts.build:all: npm run generate:all && npm run scrape:icons
